102.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| summarize p95 = percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 95)
102.title: P95 Response Time

103.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter  in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| summarize p99 = percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 99)
103.title: P99 Response Time

104.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| summarize {
    P50=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 50),
    P90=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 90),
    P95=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 95),
    P99=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 99)
  }, by:{bin(start_time, 30s)}
104.title: Response Time Percentiles (from spans)

106.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| summarize
    Samples=count(),
    Avg=avg(toDouble(duration)/1000000),
    P50=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 50),
    P95=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 95),
    P99=percentile(toDouble(duration)/1000000, 99),
    Max=max(toDouble(duration)/1000000),
    by:{Step=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, Script=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name}
| sort P95 desc
| limit 10
106.title: Top 10 Slowest Steps (P95)

107.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| summarize
    Total=count(),
    Failures=countIf(request.is_failed == true),
    by:{Step=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, Script=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name}
| fieldsAdd `Error Rate %` = if(Total > 0, 100.0 * Failures / Total, else: 0)
| filter Failures > 0
| sort Failures desc
| limit 10
107.title: Top Failing Steps

108.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, $Step_Name)
| filter isNotNull(http.response.status_code)
| summarize Count=count(), by:{Status=http.response.status_code}
| sort Count desc
108.title: HTTP Status Code Distribution

12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fieldsAdd Samples=toLong(label[samples]), Error_Pct=toDouble(label[`error.percent`])
| fieldsAdd Errors = round(Samples*(Error_Pct/100))
| fieldsAdd Successes = Samples - Errors
| fields
    Label=label[label],
    Samples,
    Successes,
    Errors,
    `Error %`=Error_Pct,
    `Avg (ms)`=toDouble(label[`average.ms`]),
    `Min (ms)`=toDouble(label[`min.ms`]),
    `Max (ms)`=toDouble(label[`max.ms`]),
    `Std.Dev`=toDouble(label[`std.dev`]),
    `Throughput/sec`=toDouble(label[`throughput.sec`]),
    `Recv KB/s`=toDouble(label[`received.kb.sec`]),
    `Sent KB/s`=toDouble(label[`sent.kb.sec`]),
    `Avg Bytes`=toDouble(label[`avg.bytes`])
12.title: Per-Label Stats (latest summary)

26.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields test.start.time
| sort test.start.time desc
| limit 1
26.title: Test Start

27.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields test.end.time
| sort test.end.time desc
| limit 1
27.title: Test Ended

28.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| fields thread.num.threads
28.title: Total Users

29.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| fields thread.ramp.up.sec
29.title: Ramp Up (sec)

3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields sample=toLong(label[samples])
| summarize TotalRequest=sum(sample)
3.title: Total Requests

30.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| fields thread.total.samples
30.title: Total Samples

31.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| fields test.duration.ms
31.title: Duration

32.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1
| fields thread.loop.count
32.title: Loop Count

34.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields avgResTime=toDouble(label[average.ms])
| summarize avg(avgResTime)
34.title: Avg Response Time

40.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields timestamp, samples=toLong(label[samples]), avg_ms=toDouble(label[average.ms]), thread.num.threads
| summarize {Throughput=sum(samples), Avg_Response_Time=avg(avg_ms), Active_Users=avg(thread.num.threads)}, by:{bin(timestamp,1m)}
40.title: Throughput · Avg Response · Active Users

5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields sample=toDouble(label[samples]), error=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| fieldsAdd ReqError = sample*(error/100)
| fieldsAdd reqSuccess = sample-ReqError
| summarize Successful_Requests = sum(reqSuccess),
            Error_Requests = sum(ReqError)
5.title: Success vs Error

6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields sample=toDouble(label[samples]), error=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| fieldsAdd success_count = sample*(1 - error/100)
| summarize Success_Rate = 100.0 * sum(success_count) / sum(sample)
6.title: Success Rate

9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| fields sample=toDouble(label[samples]), error=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| fieldsAdd err_count = sample*(error/100)
| summarize Error_Rate = 100.0 * sum(err_count) / sum(sample)
9.title: Error Rate

variables.input:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.start" and event.provider == "jmeter"
| fields name=test.plan.name
| dedup name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| fields run_start = test.start.time
| dedup run_start
| sort run_start desc

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name) AND label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields name=test.script.name
| dedup name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name) AND label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| fields name=label[label]
| dedup name
